emails.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Your Adobe Creative Cloud subscription is approaching its renewal date. For a limited time, we're offering an exclusive 20% discount on your annual renewal when you commit before October 31st.

Current plan: Creative Cloud All Apps
Regular renewal price: $599.88/year
Your special price: $479.90/year (save $119.98)

This offer includes:
• All 20+ creative apps (Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, After Effects, and more)
• 100GB cloud storage
• Adobe Fonts library access
• Latest features and updates as released

To claim your discount, simply click the renewal link below and the savings will be applied automatically at checkout.

[Renew Now & Save 20%]

Offer expires October 31, 2026. Prices shown in USD. Taxes may apply based on your billing address.

If you have any questions, our support team is available 24/7 via chat or phone.

Thank you for choosing Adobe.

---
Adobe Customer Success Team
This email was sent to james.maddox@jiaitf.example
Unsubscribe | Privacy Policy | Adobe Inc., 345 Park Avenue, San Jose, CA 95110

Hi there,

Just following up on our previous note — your Creative Cloud renewal discount is still available, but only for a few more days.

We've extended the 20% savings through November 7th as a one-time courtesy. After that, your plan will renew at the standard rate of $599.88/year.

Quick reminder of what's included:
✓ All 20+ Creative Cloud apps
✓ 100GB cloud storage  
✓ Adobe Portfolio, Behance, Fonts
✓ New AI features (Generative Fill, Text to Image, etc.)
✓ Seamless cross-device workflow

No action needed if you're happy to renew at the discounted rate — we'll process it automatically on your renewal date. If you'd prefer to adjust your plan or payment method, just log into your Adobe account.

[Manage My Plan]

Questions? Reply to this email or visit our help center.

Thanks,
Adobe Renewals Team

---
Adobe Inc. | 345 Park Avenue, San Jose, CA 95110
This promotional email was sent to james.maddox@jiaitf.example
Update preferences | Unsubscribe
